name: ai-question-bank
description: AI题库：静态官网 + 桌面端内置 FastAPI 后端

scripts.desktop:dev: npm run backend:build -- -TargetTriple x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". ./scripts/tauri-env-gnu.ps1; npm exec tauri -- dev --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run backend:build -- -TargetTriple x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". ./scripts/tauri-env-gnu.ps1; npm exec tauri -- build --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --no-bundle" && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-desktop.ps1
scripts.desktop:build:no-backend: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". ./scripts/tauri-env-gnu.ps1; npm exec tauri -- build --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --no-bundle" && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-desktop.ps1
scripts.desktop:bundle:msi: npm run backend:build -- -TargetTriple x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". ./scripts/tauri-env-gnu.ps1; npm exec tauri -- build --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --bundles msi"
